tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose regulation or prediabetes. LDL cholesterol is above the recommended range, suggesting increased cardiovascular risk. Chloride is slightly elevated and total CO₂ is mildly decreased, which may indicate a mild metabolic acidosis. Other parameters, including renal function and lipid profile, are within normal limits. Recommend follow-up for glycemic control and lipid management.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
